name: USSR Besposhchadny
events: 1 Dec 1942 Together the destroyer Boikiy claim to have destroyed a little convoy near Kaliaktra cape. First she fired a torpedo with no effect, then destroyed a little escort with gunfire and then sunk two merchants with 3 torpedoes. This claims can't be verified, but it's possible that was lost an AF gun ferry on patrol, (1)
5 Oct 1943 The day before her sinking she was attacked by the German S-boats S-28, S-42 and S-45, the torpedoes missed her and the S-45 was slightly damaged (1)
